name: pilotzap

scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.vercel-build: npm run install:all && npm run build
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.clean: rimraf frontend/dist backend/dist frontend/node_modules backend/node_modules node_modules
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check:frontend && npm run type-check:backend

description: PilotZap - Plataforma completa para automação e gestão de WhatsApp Business
author: PilotZap Team
